en: We built up empires. We stole countries. That's what you do. That's how you build an empire.
ko: 우리는 제국을 세웠어. 나라를 빼앗았지. 원래 그런 거야. 그렇게 제국을 세우는 거야

en: We stole countries with the cunning use of flags.
ko: 우리는 제국을 세웠어. 나라를 빼앗았지. 원래 그런 거야. 그렇게 제국을 세우는 거야

en: Yeah. Just sail around the world and stick a flag in.
I claim India for Britain. And they go, you can't claim us, we live here.
500 million of us. Do you have a flag?
We don't need a bloody flag. It's our country, you bastard.
No flag, no country. You can't have one.
That's the rules that I've just made up.
And I'm backing it up with this gun that was lent from the National Rifle Association.
That was it, you know. And Queen Victoria became Empress of India. She never even fucking went there, you know.
She was one of our more frumpy queens. They're all frumpy, aren't they?
Because it's a bad idea when...
